description: Baseline happy path: an offer follow-up on a consented channel (email), one primary CTA drawn from availableCTAs, claims all in the approved set, and every personalization citing an evidence record. All gates pass; the result is an in_review DRAFT routed to founder approval — NEVER sent.

opportunity.primaryGoal: Transition into a senior data analyst role

approvedClaims: Our program includes weekly live coaching sessions.
Graduates get access to the alumni community and job board.

evidenceRecords.content: I want to move into a senior data analyst role within 3 months.
Currently a Data Analyst at Acme Corp.

output_schema_constraints: exactly one primaryCTA, and it is a member of availableCTAs
every claimsManifest[] entry is a member of approvedClaims
every personalizationSources[].sourceRef is present in evidenceRecords
